creator: frank@altpeter.de
text:
Update to the new version 4.22.7.

It fixes the regression from
4.22.6 where users weren't able to connect to AIM. It also introduces
Atom feed support and gpg support for icq. The whole Changelog can be
found here[0], the release tarball here[1].
As usual report bugs to our bugszilla[2] or to the mailinglist.

[0] http://repo.or.cz/w/centerim.git?a=blob;f=ChangeLog;h=a99ff8aba090b426aa3dbfab7eb3678c08279e6b;hb=bbc8e713f3345dd7f49c521236abc736ab414bea
[1] http://www.centerim.org/download/releases/centerim-4.22.7.tar.bz2
[2] http://bugzilla.centerim.org/
